description: Each campus and associated health system must reduce total Scope 1, Scope 2, and identified Scope 3 emissions 90% from 2019 levels by 2045, neutralizing residual emissions through carbon removal.

scopes.scope1: Direct emissions from on-campus combustion (natural gas, fleet, refrigerants)
scopes.scope2: Indirect emissions from purchased electricity and steam
scopes.scope3: Commuting, business air travel, and other indirect sources

dataSource: UC Annual Report on Sustainable Practices (2024 & 2025 editions)
verification: Third-party verified annually; 2024 inventory per UC 2025 Annual Report
